coverage_notes: This file is structured for app completeness. Fault codes are mapped at family level using official support/manufacturer manuals where publicly available. PCB and certain spare-part numbers are intentionally left as VERIFY fields unless a model-specific match is securely confirmed from the exact sticker / E-Nr / revision. This avoids wrong-board ordering on region or revision variants.

models.service_notes: Use full model sticker, production index, and PCB/software revision before ordering parts. Family-level faults below are broadly applicable; code map may vary slightly by market and chassis. Exact board and lock numbers remain sticker-sensitive; use a photo of the existing PCB label before purchase.

service_identity.sticker_location_hint: Usually on the inner door frame / opening area; sometimes rear label also used depending on market.
service_identity.parts_ordering_rule: Do not order PCB or lock by family name only; use full model code, version code, and production label.

faults.title: Water supply error
faults.description: Water is not entering correctly; check tap, inlet hose, filters, and pressure.

faults.title: Drain error
faults.description: Washer is not draining in time; check pump filter, drain hose and pump.

faults.title: Unbalance load
faults.description: Load is uneven or machine is not level; rebalance load and leveling feet.

faults.title: Door error
faults.description: Door not closed/locked or lock switch wiring issue.

faults.title: Leak / abnormal water level
faults.description: Leak sensor activated, hose leak, or water level abnormal.

faults.title: Heating error
faults.description: Heater, thermistor, or related wiring not operating correctly.

faults.title: Motor / hall sensor error
faults.description: Motor rotation feedback abnormal; inspect hall sensor, motor harness, and inverter/main PCB.

faults.title: Water level sensor error
faults.description: Pressure sensor or air hose issue; verify sensor and hose integrity.

faults.title: Temperature sensor error
faults.description: Thermistor out of range or wiring issue.

faults.title: Excess foam
faults.description: Too much detergent or restricted drain causing over-sudsing correction.

boards.name: Main control PCB
boards.notes: Exact PCB depends on full model code, revision, option set, heater/steam/Wi-Fi support, and region.

boards.name: Display / UI PCB
boards.notes: Button map and fascia window must match exact panel.

boards.name: Power board / noise filter area
boards.notes: Some families integrate power stage on main PCB; others separate it.

boards.name: Inverter / motor drive PCB
boards.notes: Present only on inverter/direct-drive variable-speed families. Confirm dedicated board versus integrated drive stage.

boards.name: Motor feedback sensor / hall board
boards.notes: Common on many inverter or direct-drive platforms.

boards.name: Inverter PCB
boards.notes: Only for inverter/direct drive style families; confirm separate inverter presence.

parts.part_name: Drain pump filter cap / clean-out set
parts.notes: Match filter housing diameter and thread style.
Confirm hose route and diameter.
Match tub lip and front panel clamp style.
Confirm wattage, NTC position, and flange style.
Match resistance curve and connector.
Only for belt-drive families; not used on direct-drive models.
Length and damping force depend on drum size.
Connector and latch profile must match exact cabinet.
Single / dual / triple feed varies by dispenser design.
Confirm voltage, mounting pattern, and impeller style before ordering.
Check single/dual/triple valve configuration.
Match connector and calibration family.

faults.description: Water is not entering correctly; check tap, inlet hose, filters, and pressure.

faults.title: Drain error
faults.description: Washer is not draining in time; check pump filter, drain hose and pump.

faults.title: Unbalance load
faults.description: Load is uneven or machine is not level; rebalance load and leveling feet.

faults.title: Door error
faults.description: Door not closed/locked or lock switch wiring issue.

faults.title: Leak / abnormal water level
faults.description: Leak sensor activated, hose leak, or water level abnormal.

faults.title: Heating error
faults.description: Heater, thermistor, or related wiring not operating correctly.

faults.title: Motor / hall sensor error
faults.description: Motor rotation feedback abnormal; inspect hall sensor, motor harness, and inverter/main PCB.

faults.title: Water level sensor error
faults.description: Pressure sensor or air hose issue; verify sensor and hose integrity.

faults.title: Temperature sensor error
faults.description: Thermistor out of range or wiring issue.

faults.title: Excess foam
faults.description: Too much detergent or restricted drain causing over-sudsing correction.

faults.title: Water supply error
faults.description: Water is not entering correctly; check tap, inlet hose, filters, and pressure.

faults.title: Drain error
faults.description: Washer is not draining in time; check pump filter, drain hose and pump.

faults.title: Unbalance load
faults.description: Load is uneven or machine is not level; rebalance load and leveling feet.

faults.title: Door error
faults.description: Door not closed/locked or lock switch wiring issue.

faults.title: Leak / abnormal water level
faults.description: Leak sensor activated, hose leak, or water level abnormal.

faults.title: Heating error
faults.description: Heater, thermistor, or related wiring not operating correctly.

faults.title: Motor / hall sensor error
faults.description: Motor rotation feedback abnormal; inspect hall sensor, motor harness, and inverter/main PCB.

faults.title: Water level sensor error
faults.description: Pressure sensor or air hose issue; verify sensor and hose integrity.

faults.title: Temperature sensor error
faults.description: Thermistor out of range or wiring issue.

faults.title: Excess foam
faults.description: Too much detergent or restricted drain causing over-sudsing correction.

faults.title: Water supply error
faults.description: Water is not entering correctly; check tap, inlet hose, filters, and pressure.

faults.title: Drain error
faults.description: Washer is not draining in time; check pump filter, drain hose and pump.

faults.title: Unbalance load
faults.description: Load is uneven or machine is not level; rebalance load and leveling feet.

faults.title: Door error
faults.description: Door not closed/locked or lock switch wiring issue.

faults.title: Leak / abnormal water level
faults.description: Leak sensor activated, hose leak, or water level abnormal.

faults.title: Heating error
faults.description: Heater, thermistor, or related wiring not operating correctly.

faults.title: Motor / hall sensor error
faults.description: Motor rotation feedback abnormal; inspect hall sensor, motor harness, and inverter/main PCB.

faults.title: Water level sensor error
faults.description: Pressure sensor or air hose issue; verify sensor and hose integrity.

faults.title: Temperature sensor error
faults.description: Thermistor out of range or wiring issue.

faults.title: Excess foam
faults.description: Too much detergent or restricted drain causing over-sudsing correction.

models.service_notes: Use full model sticker, production index, and PCB/software revision before ordering parts. Family-level faults below are broadly applicable; code map may vary slightly by market and chassis. Exact board and lock numbers remain sticker-sensitive; use a photo of the existing PCB label before purchase.

service_identity.sticker_location_hint: Usually back panel or side/rear rating label.
service_identity.parts_ordering_rule: Do not order PCB or lock by family name only; use full model code, version code, and production label.

faults.title: Water supply error
faults.description: Water supply issue or inlet filter blockage.

faults.title: Drain error
faults.description: Drain hose, pump, or draining path issue.

faults.title: Unbalance load
faults.description: Tub cannot spin correctly because load is unbalanced.

faults.title: Lid / door error
faults.description: Door or lid switch is not confirming safe closed condition.

faults.title: Leak check
faults.description: Leak detection or unexpected water level change.

boards.name: Main control PCB
boards.notes: Top-load PCB software differs by lid lock, pump, and water valve configuration.

boards.name: Display / UI PCB
boards.notes: Panel legend and display window must match.

boards.name: Inverter / motor drive PCB
boards.notes: Present only on inverter/direct-drive variable-speed families. Confirm dedicated board versus integrated drive stage.

boards.name: Motor feedback sensor / hall board
boards.notes: Common on many inverter or direct-drive platforms.

boards.name: Inverter PCB
boards.notes: Only for inverter/direct drive style families; confirm separate inverter presence.

parts.notes: Confirm voltage and hose outlet direction.
Match lid strike and cabinet cutout.
Check hot/cold count and connector layout.
Confirm calibration and hose nipple style.
Length and spring rate vary by tub capacity.
Spline and diameter must match shaft.
Match connector shape and lock body by exact chassis.
Check single/dual/triple valve configuration.
Capacity and drum size must match.
